name: Moqueca De Peixe (Bahian Style Fish Stew)
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs fish fillets (cod, scrod, haddock, or any white, firm-fleshed fish)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Place a whole coconut in the oven and bake for 10 minutes.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly. Open the coconut over a large bowl, scraping out the meat with a spoon.
Reserve some of the liquid and grate the rest into the bowl. Discard shells and brown outer pieces.
Add reserved coconut water and grated coconut to the mixture.
Combine cilantro, tomato, pepper, onion in food processor until coarsely chopped.
In a large, heavy skillet over low heat, sauté chopped vegetables for 15 minutes.
Add salt and pepper, then add fish fillets. Cook additional 5-7 minutes.
Stir in remaining ingredients and simmer 5 minutes.
Serve hot with white rice and Farofa.
